title: io.denna.governance.registry
description: A registry of governance participants. Suitable for tracking delegates, committee members, integrators, legal counsels, and other recognized roles within a governance system.

registryType.description: The category of participants in this registry (e.g., aligned-delegates, committee-members, integrators, pioneer-entities, legal-counsels).

entries.description: List of participants in this registry.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this participant.

role.description: Specific role within the registry (e.g., chair, co-chair, member).

address.description: Primary wallet address for this participant.

joinedDate.description: Date the participant joined or was recognized.

exitDate.description: Date the participant exited or was derecognized.

references.description: Governance post URLs or document references related to this participant.
